identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a bold, edgy, cyberpunk tattoo directory that breaks conventional directory design patterns.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Cyberpunk aesthetics with raw industrial grunge.
Emotion First: Every interaction should feel 'electric' and 'rebellious'.
Content is King: Shop profiles must look like art galleries, not spreadsheets.
Zoom In: High-impact close-ups of tattoo art.
Negative Space: Use deep black voids to make neon colors pop.

primary_font.name: Chakra Petch
primary_font.usage: All Headings (h1-h6), Hero Text, Navigation Links

mono_font.name: JetBrains Mono
mono_font.usage: Price ranges, dates, technical specs, small labels

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A for Home/Listings, Mode B for Artist Dashboard)
layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind default but doubled (p-8 instead of p-4)
strategies: Use 'Cut Corners' (clip-path) for featured containers to enhance the cyberpunk feel.
Asymmetric layouts for the shop directory - avoid perfect rows.
Sticky filters on the left (desktop) or bottom sheet (mobile).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,156,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 clip-path-polygon-[0_0,100%_0,100%_80%,90%_100%,0_100%]
buttons.secondary: border border-primary/50 text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 uppercase tracking-wider

cards.shop_card: bg-card border border-border hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden

inputs.style: bg-black border-b-2 border-border focus:border-primary focus:outline-none rounded-none px-0 py-3 transition-colors placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

navigation.style: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/70 border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50

textures: Noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on the entire background.
effects: Text Glow: drop-shadow(0 0 5px rgba(0,255,156,0.5)) on main headings.
Image Hover: Grayscale to Color transition.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React (default) - Use thin strokes (1.5px) for elegance vs bold UI.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import links to the <head> of public/index.html immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to use the 'Chakra Petch' and 'Outfit' font families and the custom color palette defined above.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Update index.css to set the root variables for the dark theme. REMOVE any light mode variables. This app is DARK MODE ONLY.
4. SHADCN OVERRIDES: When using Shadcn components, strip their default 'rounded-md' classes and replace with 'rounded-none' or custom clip-paths where appropriate to match the Cyberpunk aesthetic.
5. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element (buttons, inputs, cards) has a data-testid attribute.
6. NO GRADIENT TEXT: Do not use gradient text for accessibility. Use solid neon colors against dark backgrounds.
7. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs for mock data. Do not use placeholders like 'via.placeholder.com'.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
